contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 45
- Description: White-label page: 7-state UI/UX audit + Phase 2 placement spec
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/662
  
  Details:
  Browser-verified audit of agroverse.shop/white-label across all 7 UI states (Playwright, Chromium, desktop + mobile, stubbed Edgar/GitHub routes).
  
  Found the shipped funnel is broken end-to-end despite the plan being ticked 'complete - deployed to production':
  - B1 (critical): registration dead-ends into an empty card. white-label.js:96 writes to #wl-auth-loading, which does not exist -> TypeError thrown between hide(form) and show(verify); the catch writes the error into a child of the form it just hid, so the error is invisible too.
  - B2 (critical): after paying, the customer sees 'No designs yet.' - initAuth->showGallery hides the success panel ~200ms after it renders.
  - B3: shipping quoted for stale weight when quantity changes (checkout at wrong shipping cost).
  - B4: gallery never sorts - upload uses legacy sign() with no Timestamp injection, so created_at is always empty.
  - Plus 9 further flow/layout defects and 5 open decisions for the governor (public-repo artwork exposure, USPS 70lb limit vs 500/1000-bar options, missing artwork template).
  
  Deliverable: per-state visual placement spec (states A-G) with rationale for each slot, 7 placement principles, sequenced PR1-PR6 (one PR per turn), resume tracker, pre-flight self-cert, and a 10-step beta UAT.
  
  Core diagnosis: the page gives its largest pixels to a stock Agroverse bar and its smallest to the customer's artwork - and for a white-label product, the artwork is the product.
  
  Merged: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/662
- Contributor(s): Claude Anthropic
- TDG Issued: 75.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
